Off Calendar Aug-24-2016 Continued To Sep-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Leo Bautista.

Ms. Navia reported that they had submitted a declaration regarding their fees, that there was a lot of time spent that they did not include, that there were times that Juan & Jesus would show up at their office with issues and that they did not charge for that time spent, that the beneficiaries are satisfied with the work that was done, that there were 6 siblings plus other family members who all wanted to give input, that they had to keep the peace between them and that they received many telephone calls. Ms. Navia further stated that this was a delicate and complicated matter, that it is unfortunate that Mr. Park is not available to confirm this and that there have been no objections by the beneficiaries. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Continued To Oct-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following two cases were called together: PES-14-297861 and PES-14-297964, the Estate of Beatrice B. Ramirez.

Appearances: Arthur Park for and with Juan Ramirez (Petitioner in PES-14-297861). Mary Ramirez (Petitioner in Pro Per in PES-14-2979864).

Mr. Park stated that he has filed a Substitution of Attorney as new counsel for Juan Ramirez. He further stated that his client agrees to withdraw his petition and Mary Ramirez also agrees to withdraw her petition and that they agree that the Public Administrator can be appointed as the administrator. Mary Ramirez confirmed that she will withdraw her petition. Both petitions are continued to October 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Park will contact the Public Administrator's office with regard to the appointment.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Continued To Sep-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bryn Rohde Davies for and with Juan Ramirez. Mary Ramirez, Josephine Ramirez and Jesus Ramirez also present.

The Parties spent time out of the courtroom discussing the matter prior to commencement of the hearing. Ms. Davies stated that a competing petition with case number PES-14-297964 was filed by Mary with a hearing date of September 23, 2014, that they talked about a buyout, about having Co-Administrators and requested that both matters be continued to September 30, 2014. The Court mentioned consideration of appointment of a neutral fiduciary. The Petitions for Letters of Administration in both matters were continued to September 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
